title: Shadowed Action Bar
description: Add text shadows to Action Bar!
body:
### Have you ever thought that Action Bar texts are a bit hard to see?
### With this mod, you will no longer have that problem!

Shadowed Action Bar is a VERY simple Fabric mod that adds background shadow to action bar texts.

Preview:
![Preview 1](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/917345899389255691/956139388289552384/unknown.png)
![Preview 2](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/917345899389255691/956142573481775174/unknown.png)
